# Vemurafenib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Vemurafenib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Vemurafenib</strong> 目前有 <strong>15 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Vemurafenib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vemurafenib is indicated in monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with BRAF-V600-mutation-positive unresectable or metastatic melanoma.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HIV infectious disease（97.7%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（96.7%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（96.6%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（96.6%）</li>
<li>acute intermittent porphyria（96.2%）</li>
<li>collagenopathy（95.3%）</li>
<li>paratenonitis（95.2%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（95.2%）</li>
<li>calcific tendinitis（95.1%）</li>
<li>lymphocytic hypereosinophilic syndrome（95.0%）</li>
<li>Plasmodium falciparum malaria（94.8%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（94.6%）</li>
<li>gout（94.3%）</li>
<li>obsolete familial combined hyperlipidemia（94.3%）</li>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（93.8%）</li>
<li>myositis（93.6%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（93.5%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（93.4%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（93.3%）</li>
<li>arteriosclerosis disorder（91.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/vemurafenib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
